note: This EPD is a cradle-to-gate study reporting 'Upstream' and 'Core' processes rather than standard EN 15804 A1-A3 modules; values taken from the 'Total' column of Table 2 per declared unit of 1 tonne. GWP-fossil=2.01E+03, GWP-biogenic=1.50E+00, GWP-total=2.01E+03. The EPD also reports a separate 'Land transformation' GWP of 4.21E+00 not included here. No separate GWP-GHG (excl. biogenic) indicator was reported.
